'''4-LB''' was a large, square [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]] who ran the [[Power Station]] at [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], where locals came to power their [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]] and equipment.<ref name="TM" /> It cared little about its customers and their whereabouts and was unenthusiastic about its role.<ref name="GG7">''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]''</ref>

During the [[Escape from Tatooine|hunt]] for [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] on Tatooine, 4-LB was questioned by [[operative]]s of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] over Tallon's whereabouts on the world. 4-LB gave them information on an individual fitting Tallon's description but confused him with [[Bels Lank]]. The conversation was overheard by the [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] [[IG-72]]. After the Rebels left, IG-72 trashed 4-LB and the Power Station before leaving for Tallon's supposed location.<ref name="TM" />

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]'' describes 4-LB as a [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]], while ''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' refers to the droid as a [[Power droid/Legends|power droid]].
